creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Kai Knoblich from comment #2)

I don't know if this bug report has simply been forgotten (I had forgotten it indeed) or if we are still waiting for the approval, but the port has already been update to 3.8.0 (bug #240446) and is now being updated to 3.8.1 (bug #240924). Then maybe it should be closed and we should now think if merge-quarterly is necessary for 3.8.1.
